expectations.text: Skill notes the type mismatch (sequence is wrong for schema)
Skill proposes ER as the right type and proceeds with ER, OR asks one clarifying question and routes to ER on confirmation
expectations.evidence: proposes ER and produces one (with placeholder schema)

expectations.text: If a diagram is produced, it is an ER diagram (entity keyword + crow's-foot relations), not a sequence diagram
expectations.evidence: ER diagram with entity keyword + <<PK>>/<<FK>> + crow's-foot
